pi_items.source: Found exactly matching output path constants in task.json instructions, export_result.sh, and verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetic data (FOMC minutes excerpt and SEP projections) created directly via setup_task.sh. The expected output file path is strictly enforced by the task scripts and verifier to be /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/FOMC_Client_Briefing.docx.
